# Revenge of the Fallen Wiki
# https://rotfserver.fandom.com/api.php?action=parse&page=Revenge%20of%20the%20Fallen%20Wiki&prop=wikitext

<mainpage-leftcolumn-start />
{{mpWelcome}}
{{mpClasses}}
{{mpItemCategories}}
{{mpOther}}
<mainpage-endcolumn />

<mainpage-rightcolumn-start />
{{mpCurrentPatch}}
<mainpage-endcolumn />
[[Category:Browse]]
